channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Florence + The Machine @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:30 — Florence + The Machine at Chase Center. Florence + The Machine is known for their powerful live performances and emotional depth, making this a must-see show.

item.title: Demi Lovato @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-12 03:00 — Demi Lovato at Chase Center. Demi Lovato's tour promises to showcase her vocal prowess and personal journey, appealing to a wide audience.

item.title: Rene Liu @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 — Rene Liu at SAP Center at San Jose. Lewis Capaldi's heartfelt ballads and engaging stage presence make his shows a memorable experience.

item.title: Lewis Capaldi @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-04 02:00 — Lewis Capaldi at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. RAYE's upcoming tour hints at new music, creating buzz around her evolving artistry.

item.title: Levity @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-10 02:00 — Levity at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Wood Brothers combine folk, rock, and blues influences, offering a rich live experience.

item.title: Yebba @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-07 03:00 → 2026-05-08 03:00 — Yebba at The Fillmore. Yebba's unique sound and emotional performances are gaining traction, making her shows highly anticipated.

item.title: The Wood Brothers @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-06 03:00 — The Wood Brothers at The Fillmore. Joyce Manor's energetic punk rock style and engaging live shows resonate with fans of the genre.

item.title: Lagwagon @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 → 2026-05-18 02:00 — Lagwagon at The Fillmore. Lagwagon's celebration of their legacy with a special anniversary tour appeals to long-time fans.

item.title: hemlocke springs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-21 03:00 — hemlocke springs at The Fillmore. hemlocke springs is gaining attention for their unique sound and engaging performances.

item.title: Good Kid @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-07 03:00 — Good Kid at Fox Theater - Oakland. Good Kid's tour is generating buzz with their fresh sound and relatable themes.

item.title: Hayley Williams @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-08 02:00 — Hayley Williams at Fox Theater - Oakland. Hayley Williams' unique event offers a fun twist, appealing to her dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Joyce Manor @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:00 — Joyce Manor at The Fillmore. Pennywise's show is a treat for punk rock enthusiasts, promising high energy and nostalgia.

item.title: AVTT/PTTN @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-05-09 03:00 — AVTT/PTTN at The Masonic. The Avett Brothers and Mike Patton's collaboration brings together diverse musical styles for an exciting show.

item.title: SANAM @ Paramount Theatre Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-11 02:00 — SANAM at Paramount Theatre Oakland. Baby Keem's rising popularity and unique sound make his show a highly anticipated event.

item.title: Seven Lions @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-31 02:30 — Seven Lions at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Seven Lions' tour is known for its immersive electronic experience, appealing to fans of the genre.

item.title: The Adicts @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-24 03:00 — The Adicts at The Fillmore. The Adicts' show promises a fun and energetic punk rock experience for fans.

item.title: Widespread Panic @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-07-17 03:00 — Widespread Panic at Fox Theater - Oakland. Dance With The Dead's unique blend of electronic and rock is gaining traction, making their show a must-see.

item.title: RAYE @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-11 02:00 — RAYE at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium.
